Email Swipe File for the Jeff Walker
Seed Launch Deep Dive Training
Prelaunch Email #1:
[SUBJECT] Call for Case Studies and…
I'm getting ready to do a live "deep dive"
training on "Seed Launches"... and I always love
when I can teach from real life examples, so I'm
looking for some fresh Case Studies.
Seed Launches are those launches where you can
start with no product and no list (or just a tiny
little list), and you roll out your launch and
literally get paid before you create the product.
I've been teaching Seed Launches for years, but
I've never done a small group, live, interactive
training like this... and I'm really excited about
it.
And that's where you might come in - if you've
done one of these launches, then I might want to
profile you and your launch. It doesn't have to be
a huge launch - because the purpose of a Seed
Launch is NOT to make a million dollars... it's
about getting started, creating your product, and
building your initial list.
In fact, my first Seed Launch only did $1,650...
but it was literally the foundation of all my
success.
So it doesn't matter how big your Seed Launch was,
I'm interested in hearing about it... and I might
want to feature you in one of my Case Studies. So
if you're interested in possibly being one one of
my Case Studies, please go fill out the form at
this link:
CLICK HERE to apply for Case Study status
WWW.PRODUCTLAUNCHFORMULA.COM

-- 1 of 6 --

Finally, if you're interested in attending my Seed
Launch "deep dive" training, as of right now I'm
not sure how many spots are available. Due to the
highly interactive nature of this program (where
students will have direct access to me), we only
have limited spots available. And unfortunately,
almost all of those spots have been already been
pre-reserved. If you want to be on the "contact
list" for any open spots, then select the "contact
list" option at this link:
CLICK HERE for "Contact List"
best regards,
Jeff
P.S. I love Seed Launches because they literally
allow you to start from scratch... and you
actually get paid before you create the product.
That's pretty cool.
AND if you already have a business and a list,
they're also great for testing out new product
ideas... and getting paid to create the products.
*************
Prelaunch Email #2:
[SUBJECT] VIDEO: answers about your Seed Launch…
Last week I put out a call for "Seed Launch" case
studies... and the response was crazy. As of
a few minutes ago, I've had 216 people fill out
the Case Study form. My team and I are still
working through all of those Case Studies
applications…
And we also got lots of questions about Seed
Launches - which is probably because you can use
a Seed Launch to get quickly get started - even if
you have no list or no product.

-- 2 of 6 --

So rather than try and answer all those questions
via email, I decided to just go ahead and shoot a
video - this video walks through the structure of
the Seed Launch, including the five primary
components.
You can watch the video at the link below (no
opt-in required):
CLICK HERE for the Seed Launch video
best regards,
Jeff
P.S. I've been teaching Seed Launches for a long time
(since the very first version of Product Launch Formula),
and I've never found any other method to get started
so quickly and so simply.
P.P.S. Seed Launches are also great if you've got an
established business and a list, and you want to test out
a new idea for a product. It's low risk, easy to do,
and you actually get paid before you create the product...
CLICK HERE for the Seed Launch video

pre-registered.

launch or fancy sales video. I've just got a

won't be open for long.
